commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Removed now-unused emitter update data from VehicleUpdateTask.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed error in state updater preparation that would have resulted in a memory access error if ever used, though we currently bypass it.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Ice debris particles are now spawned with a random rotation.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Add option to auto-generate irregularity curve for glints. The curve is generated from the size of the Physics bounding box of the vehicle at each angle of rotation around the y-axis. Only using the y-axis is good enough at this stage for a fake distant glint.
Add the option to copy the auto generated irregularity curve to the manual irregularity curve editor
Grey out the unused irregularity curve based on the "Use auto-generated curve" checkbox. By default, grey out the auto-generated curve.
Tidy text in glint editor

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Fix no ImGui indent on glint editor global settings dropdown.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed the body frame to cce rotation after a vehicle split. This means that split vehicles will now point the correct way.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Ensure the body position is represented in the correct frame when checking for SOI transitions and the closest parent is not the same as the bubble parent.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed remaining time calculation in orbit that I accidentally committed some testing changes yesterday.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Destroy previous debris particles when teleporting a vehicle.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added first pass for terrain collisions using terrain patches. These patches attempt to reuse quad vertices and swap from one side to another to nicely reuse sampled terrain heights as the patch moves. This can be viewed with a checkbox in the physics debug menu for visualization. The patches are also surrounded by 'guard' quads which will change their size depending on various factors. The 'fine' quads in the center of a terrain patch may enter a 'coarse' mode which reduces the center quads to just one quad to increase performance at very high speeds or very high simspeeds. There's still some embedding problems every now and then for very small colliders on vehicle parts when vehicles are at high acceleration, high speed, and/or high simspeed but this will all continue to be refined.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Added detection and execution of docking when two docking ports are pushed into each other with sufficient force and coarse alignment.
Changed when vehicles are removed from update tasks to be closer to when they are re-added to minimize the amount of code that will practically encounter a null update task reference.
Added an array of Parts associated with each collider in a Vehicle's Shape.
Added latching impulses to all docking ports.
Offset duplicated vehicles so they don't interpenetrate on spawn.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Removed unused parameters from Solid.frag.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Added ground clutter collision data generation on the GPU. The data is read back when it's ready. Disabled for now, as nothing uses it yet.
Added 'Collideable' toggle to ground clutter ecotypes.
Disabled ground clutter mesh snapping for collideable ecotypes, instead being placed on the height map.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Refactored entire procedural modifiers pipeline. This aims to significantly improve shader compile times for the terrain and ground clutter - should mainly affect AMD GPUs.
Separated procedural modifiers out into their own pipelines, they are now dispatched iteratively on the CPU.
Fixed terrain gradient calculations factoring in the terrain normal twice.
Improved the erosion modifier gradient accuracy. This changes the terrain - when loading a save your vessel may be floating or underground.

Procedural modifier altitude curves are now based on the planet's heightmap, they do not factor in the other modifiers' min/max potential heights. This is a result of the modifier refactoring and may change to be iterative in the future.
Added a 'height and gradients buffer' for the planet terrain and ground clutter. Terrain info is accumulated in these buffers while the procedural modifiers build the terrain.
Added custom compile options support to Rendering/Utils.cs, allowing the usage of preprocessor macros. Still needs some cleanup.
Temporarily added additional logging for the new procedural modifier pipelines' compile times.
The planet map exporter does not yet work with the procedural modifier changes.
The ground clutter collision data (currently disabled) does not yet work with the procedural modifier changes.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed old burns transferring across SOI when your vehicle changes SOI. Now with old burns when you transition SOI the old burn will be deleted.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Fixed a bug where dynamic thumbnails were causing vehicle editor gizmos to flicker or disappear.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Invert if statement in DistantGlintEditor

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Fix depth issue with glints where glints would sometimes disappear if in front of another object (such as a planet surface). This issue occurred when the glint multiplier was between 1 and 3, resulting in the brightness in the frag shader being less than 1 and causing no depth to be written. The fix was to clamp the glint multiplier to always be above 3, and there was no noticeable issue from jumping from 1 to 3 pixel diameter with this clamp when testing out the glints.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Change distant glints to use 20,000km for the end falloff distance, and increase the max falloff distance to 50,000km. This allows glints to be seen from a far greater distance and looks better in the case of the Kittens being near the Earth when viewing from afar.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added ability to select from existing vehicle or any of the available part trees for creation of new or overwrite of vehicle save files in the save vehicle dialog when in the vehicle editor. The selected option's list of parts is highlighted to help the player know which part tree they are saving.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added Editor CameraReferenceFrame.
Changed Rockets are now build top-to-bottom in vehicleEditor. (i.e in the configuration in which they will be launched)

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Add missing file for last commit.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Reversed the Sequence numbering in the sequence UI in the vehicle editor.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed Placing pieces in the VehicleEditor is now LMB clicked to select and then LMB to place. This behaviour change has broken the rotate/translate/scale gizmos as well as some of the highlighting logic. These will be fixed in a future commit.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Change glint specular variable name to from "specular" to "specCurve" to avoid confusion.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Stop CubicHermiteSplineEditor from adding a gap row every time a new point is plotted on the graph.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Average the 3 bounding box axes for the glint auto-generation irregularity curve instead of only sampling around the y-axis. This gives a better approximation of the objects shape.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed In VehicleEditor Child parts are now highlighted when hovering over a part that has child elements.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed Camera controls in editor. Mouse scroll wheel moves veiw up and down the body of the rocket. Shift + Mouse Scroll wheel zooms in and out.
Added Zoom and translation clamping for camera when in vehicle editor.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added Dropping dragged part in vehicle editor back into the parts menu will delete the dragged part.
